title: Vagina
body_html:
The relations of the vagina are:
  • Laterally: Ureter, uterine artery, Urogenital diaphragm, Levator ani
  • Anteriorly: Urethra, bladder
  • Posteriorly: Ampulla of rectum, Perineal body, Anal canal, Pouch of douglas

The vagina in women of child beaing age is approximately 3.5 inches long across the posterior wall and approximately 2.5 - 3 inches across the anterior wall.

Image sourced from Wikipedia
